description: On the Flight Details page, clicking "Continue to passenger details" appears to do nothing, leaving the user stuck on the details step.
expectedOutcome: Clicking "Continue to passenger details" should select the flight and navigate to the Passenger Details step at /passengers.
hint: Look at the composed action button component in FlightDetailPage and verify the click handler prop name is being forwarded correctly.
symptom: Continue to passenger details button is visible but does not navigate to /passengers when clicked.
exactCorrectFix: Either (1) use onPress at call site: <PrimaryActionButton data-testid="continue-to-passengers" onPress={handleSelect}> or (2) make the component accept onClick: function PrimaryActionButton({ onClick, children, ...props }) { return <button type="button" className="btn btn-primary" {...props} onClick={onClick}>{children}</button>; }
solution: Fix the overly-nested button composition so the primary CTA forwards the click handler. The simplest fix is to make PrimaryActionButton accept an onClick prop and pass it to the underlying <button> (or update the call site to use the expected prop name onPress).
